query:
SELECT c.id, c.title, 
  CASE WHEN c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl IS NULL THEN 'NO PRIMARY' ELSE 'HAS PRIMARY' END as primary_status,
  COUNT(mb.id) as total_images,
  SUM(mb.isPrimary) as primary_count
FROM campaigns c
LEFT JOIN campaign_mood_board_images mb ON mb.campaignId = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title, c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC;
